---
name: 🐞 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Lume
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / Screen Recordings**
If applicable, add screenshots or recordings to help explain your problem.

**Environment info (please complete the following information):**
- OS: macOS [e.g. Sequoia 15.1, macOS 26]
- Lume Version: [e.g. 1.4.3 (build 20)]
- Xcode Version (if building from source): [e.g. Xcode 16.0]
- LLM Provider / Model used: [e.g. OpenAI gpt-4o, Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6]

**Diagnostic logs**
Please paste any relevant error messages or contents of your `errors.log` file (which can be found in `~/Library/Application Support/Lume/errors.log`):
```text
(paste logs here)
```

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
